---
title: "ECON1550 International Finance"
subtitle: "Spring 2026"
---

Welcome to the course website for ECON1550 International Finance.

## Released materials

Student-facing files are published under `files/`.

- Problem sets: `files/psets/`
- Lecture notes: `files/lectures/`
- Slides: `files/slides/`

## What this template demonstrates

- A two-repo publish model (private instructor repo --&gt; public student repo).
- Release gating based on timestamps in `course.yml`.
- Guardrails to prevent solutions from leaking before they should.
- GitHub Pages deployment via Actions.
- Automatic publishing on push to main.
